name: HN Daily Digest
description: Your daily dose of Hacker News — top stories, spicy comments, and community vibes in 3 minutes.

cast.name: Alex
cast.description: Witty, fast-talking tech news anchor who sets up stories and keeps the energy high

cast.name: Sam
cast.description: The opinionated co-host who reacts to stories, adds hot takes, and banters with Alex

cast.name: Commenter
cast.description: The voice of HN commenters — reads direct quotes from comment threads in a distinct, dramatic, slightly snarky tone
